sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 28:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 28:1
items.html: Before the second restriction, it expanded to the Sium Raglayim of AK, and from the second restriction onward, it rises and ends above the Tabur of AK. (Inner Light, Item 1)
